title: A Cheese-Colored Camper
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's cranky grandfather drags the family to freezing Ratzikistan in his cheese-colored camper — and they discover a delicious new cheese! 🚐

q.en: What newspaper does Geronimo Stilton publish in New Mouse City?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿在新鼠城经营的是哪份报纸？

options.en: The Whisker Weekly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《胡须周刊》（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo runs The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular newspaper in New Mouse City, founded by his grandfather.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩经营着《啮齿动物公报》，这是新鼠城最受欢迎的报纸，由他的祖父创办。

q.en: Why is Grandfather William called 'Cheap Mouse Willy'?
q.zh: 威廉爷爷为什么被人叫做“小气老鼠威利”？

options.en: He once shaved off all his fur to save money on shampoo
options.zh: 他曾为省下洗发水钱把全身毛都剃光

options.en: He never buys anyone a gift according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他从不给任何人买礼物（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Grandfather loves money more than cheese; he once shaved off all his fur just to save money on shampoo and conditioner.
explain.zh: 爷爷爱钱胜过爱奶酪，他曾经为了省下洗发水和护发素的钱，把全身的毛都剃光了。

q.en: How many guidebooks to Ratzikistan does Grandfather William want to print?
q.zh: 威廉爷爷想印刷多少本关于拉齐基斯坦的旅游指南？

explain.en: Grandfather shouts 'THREE!' into the phone — he wants three million guidebooks to Ratzikistan printed right away.
explain.zh: 爷爷对着电话大喊“三！”，他要求立刻印刷三百万本拉齐基斯坦旅游指南。

q.en: Who catches rodent pox and has to stay home, leaving only four travelers?
q.zh: 谁得了“老鼠痘”只能留在家里，最后只剩四名旅客上路？

explain.en: Benjamin and Trap come down with red-bump-covered rodent pox, so they are dropped off at home before the trip.
explain.zh: 本杰明和特拉普浑身长满红疙瘩的“老鼠痘”，所以出发前被送回家留在了家里。

q.en: What color is Grandfather William's supercamper?
q.zh: 威廉爷爷的超级房车是什么颜色的？

options.en: Shiny silver according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 闪亮银色（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The supercamper is painted a deep cheddar yellow and is longer than fifty mice standing tail to tail.
explain.zh: 这辆超级房车被漆成深切达黄，长度超过五十只老鼠首尾相连那么长。

q.en: What does Tina Spicytail keep within paw's reach at night for protection?
q.zh: 蒂娜·斯派斯塔尔晚上会把什么放在手边用来防身？

options.en: A large cookbook according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一本厚重的烹饪书（按书中另一种说法）
一根可伸缩的银色擀面杖

explain.en: Tina never leaves home without her silver extendable rolling pin, given to her by Grandfather, and sleeps with it within paw's reach.
explain.zh: 蒂娜从不离身地带那根爷爷送她的可伸缩银色擀面杖，睡觉时也会把它放在手边。

q.en: In the Fossil Forest, whom does Geronimo meet — a fan with a square head?
q.zh: 在化石森林里，杰罗尼摩遇见了一位脑袋方方的粉丝，他是谁？

options.en: Grandfather William according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 威廉爷爷（按书中另一种说法）
西尔维斯特·斯夸尔泰尔

explain.en: Geronimo meets Sylvester Squaretail, a fan with a square head, snout, and shoulders, who asks for his autograph on a leaf.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩遇到了西尔维斯特·斯夸尔泰尔，一个脑袋、鼻尖和肩膀都方方方的粉丝，对方还请他在树叶上签名。

q.en: What smell leads Geronimo back to the camper after he gets lost in the woods?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在树林里迷路后，是什么气味指引他回到了房车？

options.zh: 蒂娜做的双层奶酪千层面

options.en: Freshly baked bread according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 刚烤好的面包（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo follows the heavenly scent of Tina's double-cheese lasagna to find his way back to the camper.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩循着蒂娜做的双层奶酪千层面那股诱人香味，才找回了房车。

q.en: Why is it dark in Ratzikistan even at ten in the morning?
q.zh: 为什么在拉齐基斯坦，哪怕是上午十点也还是黑漆漆的？

options.en: The camper's windows were painted black according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 房车的窗户被涂成了黑色（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It is so far north there are only a few hours of daylight
options.zh: 它太靠北了，每天只有短短几小时白昼

explain.en: Thea checks her globe and atlas and explains Ratzikistan is so far north that it gets only a few hours of daylight.
explain.zh: 蒂奥查看地球仪和地图册后解释，拉齐基斯坦地处极北，每天只有短短几小时白昼。

q.en: What golden-yellow cheese does Geronimo taste at a village and love?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在一个村庄里尝到并爱上的那种金黄色奶酪叫什么？

options.en: Swiss Cheese according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 瑞士奶酪（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: At a Ratzikistani family's dinner, Geronimo tastes Cheddarella, a golden-yellow cheese he calls the best he has ever eaten.
explain.zh: 在拉齐基斯坦一户人家的晚餐上，杰罗尼摩尝到了金黄色的“切达瑞拉”奶酪，称它是自己吃过最好吃的奶酪。
